name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard mutual NDA for protecting confidential information shared between two parties, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, and law firms.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, used to capture the specific business terms agreed upon by the parties before incorporating the standard terms by reference.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering subscription terms, order forms, and service delivery conditions.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Standard SLA designed to accompany the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement, defining uptime commitments, performance metrics, and remedies for service failures.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: Standard agreement governing the processing of personal data by a service provider on behalf of a customer, addressing GDPR and other data protection law requirements.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for early-stage design partner relationships, enabling vendors to work closely with prospective customers during product development in exchange for feedback and input.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Standard agreement for professional services engagements, covering statements of work, deliverables, payment terms, and intellectual property rights.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Standard agreement establishing a formal partnership between technology vendors, defining roles, responsibilities, revenue sharing, and collaboration terms.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA-compliant agreement governing the handling and protection of protected health information (PHI) when a service provider processes health data on behalf of a covered entity.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard agreement for licensing software products, covering license scope, restrictions, support, payment terms, and intellectual property ownership.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term agreement allowing a prospective customer to evaluate a product or service before committing to a full commercial contract, with limited scope and easy termination rights.

name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum addressing AI-specific terms and conditions for use with commercial agreements, covering topics such as AI model training, data usage, output ownership, and acceptable use policies.
